content.en:
Subsequently.

Ye Tian signed an agreement with the Sword Clan, and the Sword Clan was ready to dispatch the three Legends to the Dao Realm and follow Ye Tian into the Legendary Bitter Sea.

During this period, the task of finding the corpse of the Sword Clan patriarch was the Sword Clan's, and Ye Tian's task was to protect their safety, nothing more.

And when he went to the Legendary Bitter Sea, Ye Tian also took the time to learn about the Legendary Bitter Sea.

Although he didn't care about a replica body, he had to be responsible for at least something.

After his understanding, he finally had some understanding of the legendary bitter sea.

Legend has it that the Sea of Bitterness is very dangerous, especially in the depths of the Legend Sea of Bitterness, and even the patriarch is at risk of falling.

For example, the patriarch of the sword clan fell into the sea of legendary suffering.

But the legend of the bitter sea is so dangerous, there are still legends to the Dao realm and even the elders to enter, the reason is that there are many opportunities within the legend of the bitter sea.

One of the most attractive opportunities for the patriarchs is the supreme treasure that can transform the body of legends - the legendary ancient sand crystal!

Legend Gu Jing can make the legendary body of the consummation realm transform again, for the elders, in addition to improving their cultivation and comprehending the supreme rules of the higher realm, they are to let the body of legend transform, and it is too difficult to transform, and the legend of Gu Shajing is one of the resources.

Therefore, if the patriarchs want to transform the body of legends and thus make their strength skyrocket, they will venture to the sea of legendary suffering.

However, the elders who have truly fallen into the sea of legendary bitterness are still very rare and rare.

This time, the fall of the Sword Clan Patriarch was also unexpected by the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

After all, the fall of a patriarch is also a big loss to the Innate Origin Domain Alliance!

......

"Legend has it that the bitter sea has treasures that transform the body of legends, maybe I will have to go there often after I become a patriarch in the future!" Ye Tian said darkly.

After all, he is going to cultivate a variety of legendary bodies, and after becoming a patriarch, he has to transform all kinds of legendary bodies one by one, and he needs more resources.

Of course, maybe the Legendary Blood Treasure can also assist in the breakthrough, but it may not be able to do it, so it is necessary to prepare more good things like the Legendary Ancient Sand Crystal.

After a period of time, Ye Tian was ready to go to the Legendary Bitter Sea with the three legends of the Sword Clan.

The three legends of the sword clan are Jian Heng, Jian Lin Mountain, and Sword Nest, and they are all very powerful.

"Elder Ye, it's all up to you this time!" Jian Heng took out a low-quality second-order supreme rule item, "Our sword clan will first take out a low-quality second-order supreme rule item, no matter whether this matter is successful or not, we will take out a second low-quality second-order supreme rule item afterwards!"

"Good!"

Ye Tian accepted it.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian handed over this low-quality second-order Supreme Dao Rule item to another copy body, and followed them to the Legendary Sea of Bitterness.

......

Legend of the bitter sea.

Ye Tian and the others went through continuous shuttles, and it still took a long time to arrive here.

Legend has it that the bitter sea seems to be boundless, standing in time and space, and the breath that escapes forms a tide of time and space.

From the outside world, the Legendary Sea of Bitterness is like an ocean that has set off incomparably huge waves, but each of these waves contains terrifying power, enough to annihilate any legendary supreme realm.

If you rush indiscriminately, you will surely die.

At this time, Jian Heng said: "It is worthy of being one of the ninth legendary treasures of the Void Domain, and it is the first time for us to come here!"

They did not rush in, but waited here in silence.

You have to wait for the short period after the waves have passed, and then shuttle in, so that you can enter the sea of legendary bitterness alive.

Soon.

The waves passed, and everything became calm.

"Get in!"

Ye Tian quickly shuttled past with them.

Airplanes!

They broke through the layers of shackles and successfully entered the sea of legendary bitterness.

Legend of the bitter sea.

Ye Tian and the three legendary Dao realms of the Sword Clan entered, and they looked at the tide of time and space above, and almost in the next moment, a monstrous wave was set off there.

If it had been a little later, they would have died.

"Legend has it that the Sea of Bitterness is really dangerous, and if it is a weak Dao Realm, it will not even be able to enter. "

Ye Tian said with emotion.

"Elder Ye Tian, we have to go find the body of my ancestor!" Jian Heng said.

"Okay, you lead the way, I will keep you safe!" Ye Tian said.

Then.

Jian Heng took out a treasure and dripped his own blood into it.

Rumble!!!!

The blood was absorbed by the treasure and turned into a ray of light, spreading far away.

"There it is!"

Jian Heng sensed the location of the ancestor's body through the bloodline, if the ancestor was still alive, he would definitely not dare to do so, it would undoubtedly be to explore the location of the ancestor, which would definitely cause the ancestor's anger.

But now that the ancestor has fallen, in order to find the body, he can only choose to do so.

Whew!!!

Ye Tian and the three legends of the Sword Clan slowly advanced to the Dao Realm, not daring to advance too fast in the Legendary Sea of Bitterness.

Legend has it that there is a creature called the Legendary Bitter Beast living in the Bitter Sea, this creature does not have the blood of legend, and its own strength is not strong, and their strength comes from the Legendary Bitter Sea.

There are elders who have taken many legendary bitter beasts out, but after these legendary bitter beasts go out, their strength has become extremely weak, and they have no research value.

In other words, there is no legendary bitter sea, and these legendary bitter beasts are nothing.

But in the Legendary Bitter Sea, you have to be careful of these Legendary Bitter Beasts, but the Legendary Bitter Beasts are just a danger, and in the depths of the Legendary Bitter Sea, there are many more dangers.

There are some dangers, which are almost unknown if they are not even encountered, but once they are encountered, even the patriarchs will fall.

Maybe that's how the patriarch of the Sword Clan fell.

Soon.

Ye Tian and the others encountered a very terrifying legendary bitter beast.

Rumble!!!

A legendary bitter beast with a strange appearance and countless tentacles emerged from the sea of legendary bitterness and attacked Ye Tian and them.

Through the copying talent, Ye Tian knew the name of this legendary bitter beast.

【10,000-Hand Clawed Beast】

The name is ordinary, but the strength is not weak.

Even when Jian Heng saw it, he frowned slightly, because the strength of this 10,000-handed claw beast was no less than him!

However.

Ye Tian urged the second sequence of supreme dao rules, instantly suppressed this 10,000-handed clawed beast, and then urged the dragon scale legend body, showing a terrifying attack power.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian poked it with a shot, directly piercing through the opponent's tentacles, but did not kill it, but only severely injured the opponent.

Followed by.

Ye Tian's dense attack came, and he annihilated the opponent's body in an instant.
